typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: scripts/test-openburnbar-app.sh retry backoff uses decimal delay with bash integer arithmetic (`delay=0.5` then `delay=$((delay * 2))`), which fails when retry path is exercised.
Feature verification contract requires successful scripts/test-openburnbar-app.sh evidence, but worker transcript only captured a timed-out run.
No runtime hardening was implemented in user-testing-flow-validator finalization; changes were documentation/synthesis artifact edits only.
Editing historical synthesis artifacts does not prove required report-persistence enforcement for future successful validator runs.
Handoff commit points to unrelated artifact/doc changes; implementation commit traceability for the claimed compile-drift fix is missing.
Handoff commit points to unrelated dashboard UI changes; no auditable commit linkage to the xcresulttool invocation standardization was provided.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require infra/misc features to use a matching skill domain instead of implementation-heavy switcher skills when scope is validator/process/script hardening.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple misc-infra features were assigned switcher-integration-worker and reviewers repeatedly flagged procedure mismatch and misleading followedProcedure=true reports.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen handoff discipline: when a feature is 'already fixed' or a no-op verification, require explicit implementation SHA traceability and concrete context-read evidence before allowing followedProcedure=true.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Failing reviews for misc-infra compile-drift and xcresulttool standardization both lacked implementation SHA mapping; several reviews also flagged missing required context-read evidence despite followedProcedure=true.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated per-feature notes that scoped-only validation was used instead of broad suites.
Per-feature observations about missing context reads in transcripts.
rejectedObservations.reason: rolled up into systemic skill-guidance recommendation
